zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Veteripont於大約1254年出生時，她的父親Robert de Veteripont23歲，母親Isabel FitzJohn23歲。她於1265年6月28日與Roger II de Clifford在英國賀福爾克利福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年5月14日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Veteripont于大约1254年出生时，她的父亲Robert de Veteripont23岁，母亲Isabel FitzJohn23岁。她于1265年6月28日与Roger II de Clifford在英国賀福爾克利福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年5月14日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Veteripont was born about 1254, her father, Robert de Veteripont, was 23 and her mother, Isabel FitzJohn, was 23. She married Roger II de Clifford on 28 June 1265, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 14 May 1292.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Veteripont est née environ 1254, son père, Robert de Veteripont, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzJohn, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Roger II de Clifford le 28 juin 1265, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 14 mai 1292.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Veteripont um 1254 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Veteripont 23 und ihre Mutter Isabel FitzJohn 23. Sie hat am 28. Juni 1265 in Clifford, Herefordshire, England Roger II de Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 14. Mai 1292.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Veteripont è nata il circa 1254, sua padre, Robert de Veteripont, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Isabel FitzJohn, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Roger II de Clifford il 28 giugno 1265, nel Clifford, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 14 maggio 1292.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Veteripontが約1254年に生まれた時，父Robert de Veteripontは23歳，母Isabel FitzJohnは23歳であった。1265年6月28日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクリフォードでRoger II de Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年5月14日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Veteripont(이)가 대략 1254년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Veteripont(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzJohn(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1265년 6월 28일 영국 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 Roger II de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 5월 14일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Veteripont nasceu aproximadamente 1254, seu pai, Robert de Veteripont, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel FitzJohn, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger II de Clifford em 28 de junho de 1265, em Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 14 de maio de 1292.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Veteripont родилась около 1254 г., её отцу по имени Robert de Veteripont было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzJohn, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger II de Clifford 28 июня 1265 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 14 май 1292 г.

sm.about 1254–before 14 May 1292: e tusa o le 1254–a'e le'I oo le 14 Me 1292

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Veteripont nació aproximadamente 1254, su papá, Robert de Veteripont, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel FitzJohn, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Roger II de Clifford el 28 de junio de 1265, en Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 14 de mayo de 1292.
